questions.question_text: Explain the concept of Human Rights in Islamic thought in specification of “Status of Women in Islam”.
Write down the main principles of Islamic Economics. How do these principles provide solutions to contemporary challenges?
Elaborate the concept and importance of Ijtihad and explain its principles.
Explain the doctrine of Prophethood and its importance in human life.
Describe Hazrat Muhammad (PBUH) as a Prophet of Peace for the contemporary transnational world.
Explain the Reconstruction of Pakistani Society in the light of Islamic Teachings.
Describe the importance of Deen (Doctrine of life) in human life. Differentiate between Deen and Religions.
